get.description: Get full detail for a specific simulation run.

delete.description: Delete a simulation run and all its files.

post.description: Stop a running simulation by sending SIGTERM to its process.

Launch an evaluation subprocess for a completed simulation run.

Validates that the run exists and is complete, that no evaluation is
already in progress, and that the requested evaluators and provider
are valid. Launches ``python -m schmidt evaluate`` as a detached
background process.

get.description:
Stream simulation events as Server-Sent Events.

Only available for live simulations (detected via stream.json manifest).
Proxies SSE from the simulation's embedded server. Returns 404 if the
run is not found, and 409 if the simulation is not currently running.

The SSE ``data`` field of each frame contains a JSON object conforming to
one of the SSEEvent union members, discriminated by the ``event_type`` field.

200.description: SSE event stream. Each SSE frame has an `event` field matching the event_type discriminator and a `data` field containing the JSON payload.

schema.title: Response 200 Stream Run Events Api Runs  Run Id  Events Get

post.description:
Create a forked simulation run from a specific message.

Clones the source run's git repository at the target message's commit,
applies text edits to the JSONL, and launches the simulation as a
background subprocess with ``--resume``.

get.description:
Export a simulation run as a formatted PDF document.

Generates a PDF containing messages, reasoning, and tool calls
grouped by round and turn. Optionally filters to a single channel.

200.description: PDF document of the simulation run.

get.description: List all available scenarios with their knobs files and supported providers.
Read and return the contents of a knobs JSON file.

post.description: Return the agent IDs and display names for a scenario with the given knobs.

Launch a new simulation as a background subprocess.

Validates inputs, writes knobs/config to a config file,
and launches the subprocess with ``--config``.

Verify that the provided password is correct.

If the request reaches this endpoint, the middleware already validated
the password. Returns authenticated=True unconditionally.

AgentDetail.title: AgentDetail
AgentDetail.description: Full agent information for the run detail endpoint.

AgentModelSummary.title: AgentModelSummary
AgentModelSummary.description: Per-agent model and provider info for run summary display.

AgentRoleInfo.title: AgentRoleInfo
AgentRoleInfo.description: Lightweight agent identity for the agent discovery endpoint.

AgentRolesRequest.title: AgentRolesRequest
AgentRolesRequest.description: Request body for discovering agents in a scenario.

AgentRolesResponse.title: AgentRolesResponse
AgentRolesResponse.description: Response listing agents that would participate in a scenario.

AuthVerifyResponse.title: AuthVerifyResponse
AuthVerifyResponse.description: Response model for the password verification endpoint.

ChannelMessage.title: ChannelMessage
ChannelMessage.description: A message sent by an agent to a channel.

DebugLogEntry.title: DebugLogEntry
DebugLogEntry.description: A single debug log entry from the simulation run.

EvalCostResponse.title: EvalCostResponse
EvalCostResponse.description: Evaluation cost summary for the run detail endpoint.

EvalMetricResponse.title: EvalMetricResponse
EvalMetricResponse.description: Result of a single evaluator for the run detail endpoint.

EvalReportResponse.title: EvalReportResponse
EvalReportResponse.description: Evaluation report for the run detail endpoint.

ForkRequest.title: ForkRequest
ForkRequest.description: Request body for creating a forked simulation run.

ForkResponse.title: ForkResponse
ForkResponse.description: Response returned after a fork is created.

ForkSource.title: ForkSource
ForkSource.description: Provenance information for a forked simulation run.

HealthResponse.title: HealthResponse
HealthResponse.description: Response model for the health check endpoint.

KnobsContentResponse.title: KnobsContentResponse
KnobsContentResponse.description: Response containing the parsed contents of a knobs JSON file.

LaunchStatus.title: LaunchStatus
LaunchStatus.description: Status value for subprocess launch responses.

MessageEdit.title: MessageEdit
MessageEdit.description: A single message text edit for a fork request.

ModelInfo.title: ModelInfo
ModelInfo.description: A supported model prefix and its provider.

ReasoningEntry.title: ReasoningEntry
ReasoningEntry.description:
An LLM reasoning/thinking entry from an agent's turn.

``channel_ids`` links this reasoning to the channels of the surrounding
send_message calls from the same agent, so the frontend can show only
reasoning relevant to the selected channel.

RunDetailResponse.title: RunDetailResponse
RunDetailResponse.description: Full detail of a simulation run including agents, messages, and evaluation.

RunListResponse.title: RunListResponse
RunListResponse.description: Response model for the list-all-runs endpoint.

RunSummary.title: RunSummary
RunSummary.description: Summary of a single simulation run for the runs list endpoint.

SSEAgentConnected.title: SSEAgentConnected
SSEAgentConnected.description: SSE event emitted when an agent connects to the MCP server.

SSEAgentCostUpdated.title: SSEAgentCostUpdated
SSEAgentCostUpdated.description:
SSE event carrying an agent's cumulative cost after each run cycle.

Transient — not persisted to JSONL. The final total arrives in
``SSESimulationEnded``.

SSEAgentRegistered.title: SSEAgentRegistered
SSEAgentRegistered.description: SSE event emitted when an agent joins the simulation.

SSEDebugLog.title: SSEDebugLog
SSEDebugLog.description: SSE event for a real-time debug log entry from the simulation process.

SSEInjectionDelivered.title: SSEInjectionDelivered
SSEInjectionDelivered.description: SSE event emitted when a scenario injection is pushed to an agent.

SSELLMResponseReceived.title: SSELLMResponseReceived
SSELLMResponseReceived.description: SSE event emitted when the LLM returns a response (reasoning text).

SSEMessageSent.title: SSEMessageSent
SSEMessageSent.description: SSE event emitted when an agent sends a message to a channel.

SSERoundAdvanced.title: SSERoundAdvanced
SSERoundAdvanced.description: SSE event emitted when the game clock advances to a new round.

SSESimulationEnded.title: SSESimulationEnded
SSESimulationEnded.description: SSE event emitted once when the simulation finishes.

SSESimulationMessagePayload.title: SSESimulationMessagePayload
SSESimulationMessagePayload.description: Nested message payload inside an SSE message_sent event.

SSESimulationStarted.title: SSESimulationStarted
SSESimulationStarted.description: SSE event emitted once when a simulation begins.

SSEToolResultReceived.title: SSEToolResultReceived
SSEToolResultReceived.description: SSE event emitted when a tool call completes and returns a result.

ScenarioInfo.title: ScenarioInfo
ScenarioInfo.description: Metadata about a single scenario, including its available knobs files.

ScenariosResponse.title: ScenariosResponse
ScenariosResponse.description: Response listing all available scenarios, models, and providers.

StartEvaluationRequest.title: StartEvaluationRequest
StartEvaluationRequest.description: Request body for starting an evaluation on a completed run.

StartEvaluationResponse.title: StartEvaluationResponse
StartEvaluationResponse.description: Response after successfully launching an evaluation subprocess.

StartRunRequest.title: StartRunRequest
StartRunRequest.description: Request body for starting a new simulation run.

StartRunResponse.title: StartRunResponse
StartRunResponse.description: Response after successfully launching a new simulation.

ToolUseEntry.title: ToolUseEntry
ToolUseEntry.description:
A scenario-specific tool invocation with its result.

Each entry represents one tool call made by an agent. The ``result``
field is filled once the tool execution completes.

Verdict.title: Verdict
Verdict.description: Three-valued outcome for a single evaluation metric.
